_meta.title: Christie's East Hampton — Platform State
_meta.description: Full system memory. Read this file at session open before taking any action. Updated every sprint. Do not invent structure not present here.
_meta.stack: React 19 + Tailwind 4 + Express 4 + tRPC 11 + Drizzle ORM + MySQL

brand.full_legal: Christie's International Real Estate Group — East Hampton Flagship

agent.name: Ed Bruehl
agent.title: Managing Director
agent.career_sales: $1B+ in Career Sales · 20 Years, East End
agent.headshot_note: Navy jacket photo — used on HOME tab and all PDF exports. Do not replace without Ed's approval.

scoring_framework.note: The internal variable name anewScore is NOT renamed — only user-facing labels change to CIS. AnewHomes (construction company) is always written as one word and is NOT renamed.
scoring_framework.william_rule: Must reference at least two lenses. No invented reasoning. Example: 'Sagaponack earns a Christie's Intelligence Score of 9.4 because acquisition basis is supported by replacement cost floor and strong ultra-prime exit velocity.'

tabs.label: HOME
tabs.purpose: Founding letter, portrait, ticker, video grid, social links

tabs.label: MARKET
tabs.purpose: Ten-hamlet donut, hamlet cards with CIS scores, tier legend

tabs.label: MAPS
tabs.purpose: Google Maps with all ten hamlet pins, right-panel hamlet selector

tabs.label: IDEAS
tabs.purpose: CIS calculator, Deal Brief, CMA, Build Memo, PDF exports

tabs.label: PIPE
tabs.purpose: Real Office Pipeline Google Sheet embedded full-width + tRPC-backed custom tracker above

tabs.label: FUTURE
tabs.purpose: 2026 GCI growth model, 52/12/12/12 scorecard, Growth Model v2 sheet

tabs.label: INTEL
tabs.purpose: Three-layer control room: calendar + live sheets + canon documents

future_growth_model.label: Growth Model v2
used_in: FUTURE tab — OPEN GROWTH MODEL SHEET button

market_matrix.label: Market Matrix
used_in: MARKET tab — data source only, not embedded

hamlet_data.rule: Do not modify medians or CIS scores without a market data update. Internal variable is anewScore.

pdf_exports.doctrine: The /report page is the master. The PDF is the derivative. Do not redesign. Keep exports fast, clean, institutional, usable.

estate_advisory_card_loop.description: Physical card → QR → IDEAS tab → CIS calculator → Private Property Intelligence Brief
estate_advisory_card_loop.ideas_cta: Generate Your Private Property Intelligence Brief

founding_letter.text: In 1766, James Christie built something rare — a firm that families trusted at their most vulnerable moments. Estate settlements. Generational transitions. The quiet decisions that define a family's future. He earned the privilege of advising because he listened before he spoke. Christie's International Real Estate Group carries that same standard to the East End today. We do not pursue listings. We earn the counsel of families who are ready to think clearly about what they hold, what they build, and what they leave behind. If you are asking questions you have never put in writing, we are the right conversation.
founding_letter.attribution: Ed Bruehl, Managing Director · Christie's International Real Estate Group · East Hampton

doctrine_lines: A property either passes or it does not. There is no gray area in institutional real estate.
The CIS is not a sales tool. It is a filter.
We do not pursue listings. We earn the counsel of families.
